meaning: adj.致硬化的 硬化性的,硬化型的
examples: Subacute sclerosing panencephalitis (SSPE) is a very rare, progressive neurological disorder.
Objective To investigate the feasibility of sclerosing agent injection in the treatment of benign thyroid cysts.
This trichrome stain of the liver demonstrates extensive portal tract fibrosis with sclerosing cholangitis. The hepatocytes are normal.
